pageContext.name: Tenten
pageContext.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse present the Tenten Collectible Figure!  From the anime series Naruto:Shippuden comes a new Naruto Girls Tenten figure! Standing at 9.36' tall and holding her scroll, she is sculpted in amazing detail.  Don't miss your chance to add this Naruto figure to your anime collectibles display today!
